prompt: Create a vertical close-up anime illustration of Hikari, a shy young woman sitting inside a nostalgic wooden streetcar on a sunny summer day. She has short soft pale blonde bobbed hair with delicate strand detail and one distinctive ahoge hair loop rising above her head. Her face is intentionally hidden by a centered plain skin-tone rectangular censor block, covering the eyes, nose, and mouth while leaving the hair, ear, neck, and pose visible. She wears a light white summer sailor-style blouse with navy double stripe trim on the collar and sleeves, plus a dark navy ribbon bow tied at the chest; the fabric is slightly translucent and sunlit with realistic folds. Pose her seated on a dark green vinyl bench seat, upper body leaning slightly forward, one arm resting down in the foreground and the other hand raised near her right ear as if nervously adjusting her hair. The background is the interior of an old tram: warm polished wood window frames, overhead hanging straps, ceiling lights, green seats, and large windows on the right showing bright leafy trees outside. Use strong natural sunlight streaming through the windows, soft highlights on hair and skin, warm reflections on the wooden interior, shallow depth of field, highly polished modern anime rendering, delicate linework, realistic lighting, vertical smartphone composition, intimate portrait framing from torso to top of head. No text, no watermark, no extra characters.
